subcodes.first_line: O Lord of the Kingdom, of Power and of Might! Thou beholdest me as I cry out for Thy succour and seek refuge at the gate of Thy mercy [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا رب الملکوت و القدره و الجبروت ترانی مستغیثا بک و مستجیرا بباب رحمتک و
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for specific individuals; groups, @predictions and prophecies, @power of prayer, @transcendence; unknowability of God
